basic.name: Barath Nethra
basic.tagline: Frontend Developer with 4+ years of experience building scalable, high-performance web applications.
basic.summary: Skilled in JavaScript, Nextjs, React, TypeScript, Redux, Tailwind CSS, and modern testing frameworks. Strong expertise in responsive UI, accessibility, and performance optimization. Adept at collaborating in agile teams and delivering pixel-perfect, user-focused applications.

experience.description: Built and optimized React.js & Next.js applications by developing reusable components for scalability. Ensured high code quality through peer reviews and Test-Driven Development (TDD) practices. Integrated and managed REST and GraphQL APIs for seamless data handling in React frontends & handling CICD pipeline.
Built Next.js Full-stack apps with responsive React frontend. Integrated REST APIs for dynamic content rendering. Improved SEO through meta tag optimization and schema markup.
Developed high-performance Next.js projects with server-side rendering. Styled modern responsive UIs using Tailwind CSS. Worked on API routes and authentication flows in Node.js Applications.

Built scalable, responsive UIs using JavaScript, TypeScript, and React. State management using both Redux and the Context API. Proficient in API integration for efficient and reliable handling of real-time data.

education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering: Electronics and Communication

technical: Engineering intelligent AI Agents for real-world tasks
Exploring Large Language Models (LLMs) and Generative AI
Building autonomous systems that make a difference

current_focus: AI Agent Frameworks — LangChain, AutoGPT, and custom agent architectures
Advanced LLM Integration — Prompt engineering, RAG, and fine-tuning
Autonomous Systems — Building loops that observe, think, and act
